assertions.assertion: Program.cs removes or replaces at least one static AddOpenIdConnect registration with dynamic provider configuration
assertions.rationale: The static AddGoogle() and AddOpenIdConnect('EntraId') registrations are removed and replaced with dynamic provider configuration via AddConfigurationStore().

assertions.assertion: Program.cs or a seed file creates an OidcProvider with Scheme set to 'demoidsrv' and Authority set to 'https://demo.duendesoftware.com'
assertions.rationale: The seed function creates `new OidcProvider { Scheme = "demoidsrv", Authority = "https://demo.duendesoftware.com", ClientId = "login" }`.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddConfigurationStoreCache() for caching dynamic provider lookups
assertions.rationale: Code shows `.AddConfigurationStoreCache()` chained on the IdentityServer builder.

assertions.assertion: Response mentions or acknowledges that dynamic identity providers require the Enterprise Edition
assertions.rationale: Response states: 'Dynamic identity providers require the Duende IdentityServer Enterprise Edition.'
